name: Chocolate Chip Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Combine sugars, oil, egg, and vanilla in a bowl.
3. Stir in dry ingredients (flour, oatmeal, baking powder, and salt).
4. Fold in the chocolate chips.
5. Drop by spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from sheet and cool.
